Touch this file (any change) and push to main to fire
.github/workflows/cf-bootstrap.yml. The workflow is idempotent —
re-running on subsequent edits is safe and just no-ops the items
that are already configured.

Last run trigger: 2026-05-05 — initial bootstrap of WAF + Bot Fight
+ Rate Limiting + Worker Errors notification + Web Analytics.

2026-05-05 evening — re-fire to add 5 Clerk production-domain DNS
records (clerk / accounts / clkmail / clk._domainkey / clk2._domainkey).
Existing bootstrap items re-run idempotently.

2026-05-05 evening (retry) — first re-fire didn't propagate, possibly
because the previous push also modified the workflow file itself.
This commit only touches the marker so the workflow auto-fires
cleanly on a marker-only push.

2026-05-06 evening — re-fire to enable the post-launch edge primitives
(WAF managed ruleset, Bot Fight Mode, Rate Limiting on /api/*, Worker
Errors notification → nurelimusabay@gmail.com, Web Analytics for
ptowl.com). All steps are idempotent so any item already configured
no-ops cleanly.
